channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: Willpower is finite
item.description:
Notes:

As we use out willpower throughout the day it drains. As it drains it becomes easier to give into bad decisions. Even though willpower is limited we can expand it through practice like any other muscle.

Sources:

  • Newport, C. (2016). Deep work: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.
  • Duhigg, C. (2012). The power of habit: Why we do what we do in life and business. Random House.
